'''Feena Shaan''' was a native gang leader on [[Mawan/Legends|Mawan]] in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], when [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were [[Mission to Mawan|sent there]] to make peace. Feena controlled most of the goods and services sold to the majority of citizens harbored beneath the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Naatan]]. She also knew the tunnels below almost as well as those of the Resistance movement.

{{Char-stub}}
